reasoning: Today's workout targets your lactate clearance and aerobic base, focusing specifically on reducing the power decline from your 5- to 20-minute efforts. Your last ride was mainly an aerobic effort; now let's challenge that weak point. We'll simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop's main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 10 minutes: 3 min at 218W, 4 min at 242W, 3 min at 256W, recover 5 min between sets. This will enhance lactate clearance and prepare your body for the sustained efforts on Alpine Loop.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
